Torn, Frost-Covered Book  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE
Torn, Frost-Covered Book
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE

Item Lore:Left half of the book of scale
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Srophkor
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 05:30:55
Page Updated:Sun Sep 12th, 2021

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Dreadlands
NPC Name
Gorenaire
The Fabled Gorenaire

Permafrost Keep
NPC Name
Lady Vox

Timorous Deep
NPC Name
Faydedar
The Fabled Faydedar

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Plane of Sky
Quest Name
The Fiery Avenger

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Dreadlands
Permafrost Keep
Timorous Deep


Uploaded June 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin

location
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2007 at 3:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591918908045
10 posts
faydedar can be found by tracink from sout western double islands .Woot i killed that at last :) i am a happy pally now :)
▲ Page top
DOUBLE-WOOT!
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2007 at 10:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592343967713
138 posts
How many pallies do you know got BOTH halves on the same day?

Well, now you know one, anyway. :)

Looted from Faydedar on Stromm at exactly 22:44:48 MTN, Wed Jan 10, 2007. He was hanging around the southwest corner. From the OT translocator, it was a loooong run...

Anyway. Best of luck to all you pallies out there. BELIEVE!
▲ Page top
Frost Covered Book Drop
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2006 at 10:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591900994278
40 posts
We recently got the Torn, Frost Covered Book from Gorenaire in the Dreadlands on the Stromm Server. THANK YOU soo much good friend and Realm of Magic guildie for weeks of visiting the Dreadlands and checking track for this elusive mob. Gorenaire was waundering in the area just below the ice caves and we dropped him on the snowy slopes, with the help of several guild members ~~ thankies and <3 you all Realmers .../hugs

He does fear, resisted with about 290ish magic resist. Otherwise not too hard of a battle.

Loot Table:
Torn, Frost Covered Book (two of these)
While Dragon Scale for the Bard Epic
and some pretty nice spells too :D
▲ Page top
just looted
QuoteReply
# May 12 2006 at 10:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591857037841
8 posts
just looted today on zek server from gorenair
▲ Page top
Mob Drops
QuoteReply
# May 12 2006 at 9:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593366119426
12 posts
Rumor has this book and it's sister book, the burnt book no longer drop off any dragons but Vox and Naggy as of about 2 years ago, please confirm.
▲ Page top
Mob Drops
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2013 at 2:01 PM Rating: Decent
stef0knee
Scholar
96 posts
While this is... seven years after your question, the answer is no. It still drops off of Gorenaire in Dreadlands; just looted it today on Quellious-Povar.
▲ Page top
RE: Mob Drops
QuoteReply
# May 14 2006 at 7:18 PM Rating: Decent
Fabbon
Scholar
31 posts
I can confirm that the Torn, Frost covered book does still drop off of Faydedar. I have 6 kills in the past 30 days and had 2 books drop.
You can get the Torn, Burnt book from Nagafen, Severilous, Talendor, and Melalafen. The Torn, Frost covered book drops from Vox, Gorenaire, and Faydedar.

____________________________
Peace be the journeys,
Fabbon
▲ Page top
5 kills no book
QuoteReply
# May 03 2006 at 8:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791884110
14 posts
Wife and I (Pally 68 and druid 69) killed it 5 times thus far with no luck on the book. Pretty easy , but books is not droping for us. =/.
▲ Page top
RE: 5 kills no book
QuoteReply
# May 03 2006 at 8:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791884110
14 posts
Oops...5 kills on Faydedar that is.
▲ Page top
Question
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2005 at 10:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1627258672042
View User Forum
Scholar
23 posts
Can a good group take on Faydedar? and if so what lvl do they need to be?
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2006 at 1:34 PM Rating: Decent
klona
108 posts
A group of 70's can take Gore or Fay. Be sure to have a good tank and you will need a cleric. A slower would help as well but not needed really.
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2006 at 3:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
Faydedar is only level 55, if you have decent resists it's soloable by any reasonably well geared melee. (Done by 70 monk w 10k hp, 2100 ac, 500ish AA, using a Damage Shield Potion and Mend).
▲ Page top
How common?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2003 at 11:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591794505832
31 posts
How common does this book drop?
▲ Page top
RE: How common?
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2006 at 1:35 PM Rating: Decent
klona
108 posts
Old post but I will respond for the next few looking for info ...

This and it's twin drop Uncommonly to Rare. It will NOT drop on every kill or even every 3rd kill. Good luck!
▲ Page top
MQ

# Sep 01 2003 at 10:27 AM Rating: Default

9 posts
can the turn in be MQ'ed my sons ranger got this book
▲ Page top
RE: MQ
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 9:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759424135
13 posts
Yes this can be MQ'ed for the Book of Scales, I had actually helped a Pally with it as well (Another person had also turned in the fire book, so doing only 1/3 is still possible in getting the book).

# Mar 19 2003 at 5:09 AM Rating: Default

# Mar 29 2003 at 1:05 AM Rating: Decent
